sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented in available sources

special_mechanics.name: Transformation to Bert
special_mechanics.description: Collecting pills temporarily transforms Mark into Bert, who can fly and shoot beams at limited distance. Beams have stronger effect on enemies than Mark's bat attack and gradually improve as player completes levels.

special_mechanics.name: Bat Attack & Projectile Deflection
special_mechanics.description: Mark wields a baseball bat to attack and deflect projectiles. Rebounding projectiles back at bosses is often necessary to defeat them due to Mark's limited attack options.

tier_notes: Tier 3: Empirical/qualitative data only. Available sources (TCRF and Wikipedia) contain no documented movement parameters, gravity values, jump physics, or sub-pixel system specifications. Data consists of gameplay mechanics and level design information only.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Monster Party article
